decisions.decision: Keep machine manifests as durable workspace law center
Separate behavior-truth order from workspace-authority order
Promote Code Review Graph to first-class derived context engine
Slim `docs/operations/current_state.md` into live control pointer only
Prefer graph metadata sidecar in P2 if locally verifiable

risks: Online snapshot may lag local branch tip.
Topology/schema coupling may require careful P1 adaptation.
Graph builder path mode and wrapper portability require local verification before P2.
Archive evidence contains secret references and junk artifacts; promotion without sanitization is unsafe.
assumptions: online-only Pro/review workflows are now first-class
graph.db remains tracked absent severe blocker
unrelated dirty work may exist and must be preserved
P0 should avoid source/scripts/tests behavior edits

graph_policy.stale_graph: warning for repo health; blocker for graph-confidence claims
